mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT o.id, o.order_number, o.order_mode, s.name AS approval_status, o.address_id, o.address_snapshot, o.user_id, o.order_date, o.ship_date, o.due_date, o.merchandise_amount, o.shipping_fee, o.discount_amount, o.total_amount, o.payment_status, o.comment FROM orders o JOIN order_approval_status s ON o.order_approval_status_id = s.id JOIN order_products op ON op.order_id = o.id AND op.deleted_date IS NULL JOIN products p ON p.id = op.product_id WHERE o.order_number = #{orderNumber} AND p.user_id = #{sellerId} AND o.deleted_date IS NULL LIMIT 1

SELECT op.id, op.order_id, op.product_id, op.cart_item_id, op.product_name, op.quantity, op.unit_price, op.total_price, op.option_info FROM order_products op JOIN products p ON p.id = op.product_id WHERE op.deleted_date IS NULL AND p.user_id = #{sellerId} AND op.order_id IN
#{orderId}
